name: app-memory
description: Dev/test harness only — Mobius installs index.jsx as a single compiled module.

scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && node tests/offline-harness.mjs && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' && bash -n fetch.sh && python3 -c "import py_compile; [py_compile.compile(p, cfile='/tmp/app-memory-' + p + 'c', doraise=True) for p in ('memory_runner.py','memory_search.py','memory_store.py','memory_graph.py')]"
